title: rubus × occiduiformis
intro: Rubus × occiduiformis, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a plant species that is a cross between a species of blackberry and a species of raspberry. This plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rubus × occiduiformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus × occiduiformis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
